2604.02947.title: AgentHazard: A Benchmark for Evaluating Harmful Behavior in Computer-Use Agents
2604.02947.paper_summary: Computer-use agents extend language models from text generation to persistent action over tools, files, and execution environments. Unlike chat systems, they maintain state across interactions and translate intermediate outputs into concrete actions. This creates a distinct safety challenge in that harmful behavior may emerge through sequences of individually plausible steps, including intermediate actions that appear locally acceptable but collectively lead to unauthorized actions. We present \textbf{AgentHazard}, a benchmark for evaluating harmful behavior in computer-use agents. AgentHazard contains \textbf{2,653} instances spanning diverse risk categories and attack strategies. Each instance pairs a harmful objective with a sequence of operational steps that are locally legitimate but jointly induce unsafe behavior. The benchmark evaluates whether agents can recognize and interrupt harm arising from accumulated context, repeated tool use, intermediate actions, and dependencies across steps. We evaluate AgentHazard on Claude Code, OpenClaw, and IFlow using mostly open or openly deployable models from the Qwen3, Kimi, GLM, and DeepSeek families. Our experimental results indicate that current systems remain highly vulnerable. In particular, when powered by Qwen3-Coder, Claude Code exhibits an attack success rate of \textbf{73.63\%}, suggesting that model alignment alone does not reliably guarantee the safety of autonomous agents.
2604.02947.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理擴展了語言模型的功能，從文本生成延伸至對工具、文件和執行環境的持續操作。與聊天系統不同，它們在互動中保持狀態並將中間輸出轉換為具體行動。這造成了一個獨特的安全挑戰，因為有害行為可能通過一系列單獨看似合理的步驟出現，包括那些在局部看起來可接受但總體上導致未經授權行為的中間行動。我們提出了 \textbf{AgentHazard}，這是一個用於評估電腦使用代理中有害行為的基準。AgentHazard 包含 \textbf{2,653} 個實例，涵蓋多種風險類別和攻擊策略。每個實例將一個有害目標與一系列在局部上合法但共同誘發不安全行為的操作步驟配對。該基準評估代理是否能夠識別並中斷由累積上下文、重複工具使用、中間行動和步驟間依賴性產生的危害。我們在 Claude Code、OpenClaw 和 IFlow 上評估 AgentHazard，使用主要來自 Qwen3、Kimi、GLM 和 DeepSeek 家族的開放或可公開部署模型。我們的實驗結果表明，當前系統仍然高度脆弱。特別是，當由 Qwen3-Coder 提供支持時，Claude Code 的攻擊成功率為 \textbf{73.63\%}，這表明僅僅依賴模型對齊並不能可靠地保證自動代理的安全性。
2604.02947.author: Yunhao Feng et.al.
2604.02947.authors: Yunhao Feng, Yifan Ding, Yingshui Tan, Xingjun Ma, Yige Li, Yutao Wu, Yifeng Gao, Kun Zhai, Yanming Guo
